SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.db

Class DbController

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.db.DbController
@RestController @CrossOrigin @RolesAllowed({"admin","operations"}) @RequestMapping("/rest") @Lazy(false) public class DbController extends Object
This class provides APIs to manage information in the database.
Author:

  • Constructor Details

    • DbController

      @Autowired public DbController(gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.IHostRepository hostService, DbController.DbControllerConfiguration config, gov.cdc.izgateway.security.AccessControlRegistry registry)
      Construct a new DBController class.
      Parameters:
      hostService - The service use to access running hosts
      config - The configuration providing access to db services
      registry - The access control registry managing these APIs

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      protected void refresh()

    • getMessageHeaders

      @GetMapping("/headers") public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader.Map getMessageHeaders(@RequestParam(defaultValue="") String include)
      Report on content in the MessageHeader records in the system configuration.
      Parameters:
      include - The list of headers headers to match
      Returns:
      A map containing the header information.

    • getMessageHeadersById

      @GetMapping("/headers/{id}") public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader getMessageHeadersById(@PathVariable String id)
      Get Message Header Info entry for a given endpoint
      Parameters:
      id - The MSH3 or MSH4 value to retrieve an entry for
      Returns:
      The message header record for the specified MSH value.

    • setMessageHeadersById

      @PostMapping("/headers/{id}") public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader setMessageHeadersById(@PathVariable String id, @RequestBody MessageHeader newValues)

    • deleteMessageHeadersById

      @DeleteMapping("/headers/{id}") public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader deleteMessageHeadersById(@PathVariable String id)

    • createMessageHeadersById

      @PutMapping("/headers") @ResponseStatus(CREATED) public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader createMessageHeadersById(@RequestBody MessageHeader newValues)

      The status of all destinations scheduled for maintenance
